title: legends & lore (optimized)
description:
the (unofficial) fusion of the modpacks
Fabulously Optimized and Prominence II RPG: Hasturian Era.
body:
This modpack is built for performance and immersion.
Inspired by Fabulously Optimized, it offers a highly optimized experience while introducing an engaging fantasy-medieval world full of epic bosses, deep lore, and relaxing medieval life mechanics for more chill players.

With a rich quest system and a full story-driven progression, it’s perfect for solo adventurers or LAN parties (thanks to the e4mc mod).

🛡️ Important:
To fully enjoy this experience, you’ll need to manually install the following mods due to copyright restrictions:

FTB Teams

FTB Library

FTB Quests

i hope you'll enjoy it :)
